malta.name: Malta
malta.requirements:
- Minimum HSC / A-Levels with 55% marks
- IELTS 5.5 or MOI / English Proficiency interview
malta.programs:
- Information Technology
- Business Administration
- Hospitality & Tourism Management
- Cyber Security
malta.fees:
- Tuition: €4,000 - €7,000 per year
- Living costs: €400 - €600 per month
malta.embassy_documents:
- National D-Visa (Schengen Area)
- Proof of accommodation & bank statement
malta.application_processing:
- VFS Global appointment
- Processing time: 3-5 weeks
malta.other_details: English Speaking Schengen Country in Europe. Full Schengen access with excellent part-time job opportunities.

thailand.name: Thailand
thailand.requirements:
- High school completion / HSC
- Basic English proficiency or MOI accepted
thailand.programs:
- International Business
- Tourism & Hospitality
- Engineering & Computer Science
- International Relations
thailand.fees:
- Tuition: $2,500 - $5,500 per year
- Very low living costs ($250 - $400 per month)
thailand.embassy_documents:
- Non-Immigrant ED Visa
- University Admission Letter
thailand.application_processing:
- Thai Embassy in Dhaka
- Fast processing (1-2 weeks)
thailand.other_details: Popular Asian Study Destination with modern universities, affordable tuition, and rich cultural environment.

malaysia.name: Malaysia
malaysia.requirements:
- HSC with minimum 2.5/3.0 GPA
- IELTS 5.0-5.5 (or intensive English program upon arrival)
malaysia.programs:
- Engineering
- IT and Data Science
- Business and Accounting
- Hospitality
malaysia.fees:
- Tuition: $3,000 - $6,000 per year
- Affordable living costs
malaysia.embassy_documents:
- EMGS (Education Malaysia Global Services) Approval Letter (VAL)
- Medical screening report
- Academic transcripts
malaysia.application_processing:
- Single Entry Visa (SEV) from the High Commission in Dhaka after EMGS approval
- Fast processing (2-3 weeks)
malaysia.other_details:

china.name: China
china.requirements:
- Minimum HSC/A-Levels with 60% marks
- Valid passport with at least 1 year validity
- Police clearance certificate
- Medical fitness certificate
china.programs:
- MBBS (Medicine)
- Engineering (Computer Science, Mechanical, Civil)
- Business Administration (BBA/MBA)
- Chinese Language Programs
china.fees:
- Tuition: $2,000 - $5,000 per year
- Hostel: $500 - $1,000 per year
- Chinese Govt Scholarships (CSC) available covering full tuition and accommodation
china.embassy_documents:
- JW202 form (Visa Invitation Letter)
- Admission Letter
- Physical Examination Form
- Bank Statement (minimum $3000 equivalent)
china.application_processing:
- Intakes: September (Autumn) and March (Spring)
- Processing time: 4-6 weeks for JW202

finland.name: Finland
